arts.ttl: Training Report: Bayern Munich’s Raphaël Guerreiro misses training; Leon Goretzka leaves training early; Kim Min-jae makes his return; Kingsley Coman is still out; and MORE!
arts.sum: Later, Bild (via @iMiaSanMia ) would report that Guerreiro worked out indoors and that his status for Friday’s match against FC Augsburg would be determined on Thursday: According to a report from Bild (via @iMiaSanMia ), Bayern Munich had quite a few youth players work out in first team training:

arts.ttl: “Fantastic news” — Harry Kane celebrates Joshua Kimmich’s Bayern Munich extension
arts.sum: I’m looking forward to more moments with him on the pitch. After Joshua Kimmich re-upped, striker Harry Kane heaped praise on his teammate and looked forward to the coming years together.

arts.ttl: Report: Bayern make changes in the scouting department
arts.sum: Nils Schmadtke, Bayern’s new head of scouting, has made changes in the department. It seems that Bayern Munich ’s scouting department is undergoing changes.

arts.ttl: Marc-André ter Stegen dives into his frustration over previous battles for the Germany No.1 position with Manuel Neuer
arts.sum: But when Neuer managed to work his way back to full fitness just before the World Cup in Russia, Ter Stegen had to watch his starting role disappear just like that: “The 2018 decision hit me the hardest. Prior to the 2018 World Cup, for example, an injury has ruled Neuer out for over a year and saw Ter Stegen take over as Germany finished with a 100% record.

arts.ttl: Bavarian Podcast Works — Preview Show: FC Augsburg vs. Bayern Munich (Bundesliga)
arts.sum: The Bavarians, of course, are very banged up at the moment and Vincent Kompany will have to work around the numerous injuries on the squad. A guess at Bayern Munich ’s starting XI, which is a tough ask given all of the injuries.

arts.ttl: Preview: Augsburg vs. Bayern Munich - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Friday's Bundesliga clash between Augsburg and Bayern Munich, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich scout Malick Thiaw during the Milan derby
arts.sum: Serie A giants Milan and Inter played out a 1-1 draw in the first leg of the Coppa Italia semi-final and Bayern Munich manager Vincent Kompany was watching from the…

arts.ttl: “Konrad Laimer and Bayern Munich are a very good fit” — Christoph Freund wants a long-term stay for fellow Austrian
arts.sum: Bayern Munich ’s signing of Konrad Laimer was one of the worst kept secrets of German football a couple of years back, with the Austrian’s failed moved in 2022 paving the way for a free transfer in 2023, agreed months before the season had ended. But he worked hard to earn his role under new coach Thomas Tuchel and has solidified himself as an important member of the squad in his two years at the club.
